---
title: "Cartera de Propiedades"
subtitle: "Departamentos, casas y oficinas administradas"
listing:
  contents: propiedades
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: "220px"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    categories: "Etiquetas"
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
